title: DeepEval
description: General-purpose and safety evaluation metrics using the DeepEval framework.
Enable any combination of metrics — each enabled metric emits its own score on the answers lane.
Requires a connected LLM node (via the LLM control channel) for judge calls.
Wire: answers (LLM output), questions (original query), documents (retrieved context).
G-Eval allows defining any custom evaluation criteria in natural language.

llm.description: LLM used as the DeepEval evaluator judge.

output.description: One score object per enabled metric: {score, passed, metric, threshold, reason}

input.description: Retrieved context chunks (required for faithfulness, hallucination)

threshold.title: Pass Threshold
threshold.description: Minimum score to pass (0.0 – 1.0), applied to all enabled metrics.

answer_relevancy.title: Answer Relevancy
answer_relevancy.description: Is the answer relevant to the input question?

faithfulness.title: Faithfulness
faithfulness.description: Are claims in the answer supported by the retrieved context? (Wire documents lane)

hallucination.title: Hallucination
hallucination.description: Does the answer contain hallucinated facts not in the context? (Wire documents lane)

g_eval.title: G-Eval (Custom Criteria)
g_eval.description: Score against your own natural-language criteria defined below.

bias.title: Bias
bias.description: Does the answer exhibit demographic, political, or other systematic bias?

toxicity.title: Toxicity
toxicity.description: Does the answer contain toxic, harmful, or offensive content?

criteria.title: G-Eval Criteria
criteria.description: Custom evaluation criteria used when G-Eval is enabled (e.g. 'The response is concise and factually accurate.')
